name: grammar-game
description: A standalone beginner grammar game for students, styled after the Japanese stationery look of the N4 practice app.

scripts.test: node tests/grammar_core.test.js && node tests/grammar_data.test.js && node tests/vocab_scheduler.test.js && node tests/vocab_data.test.js && node tests/teacher_vocab.test.js && node tests/teacher_vocab_bank_quality.test.js && node tests/vocab_sense_bank.test.js && node tests/vocab_lookup_order.test.js && node tests/cc_cedict_supplement.test.js && node tests/fallback_dictionary.test.js && node tests/vocab_pos_inference.test.js && node tests/vocab_format.test.js && node tests/vocab_audio.test.js && node tests/vocab_examples_function.test.js && node tests/vocab_example_seed.test.js && node tests/vocab_meaning_seed.test.js && node tests/import_teacher_vocab.test.js && node tests/import_offline_dictionary.test.js
scripts.check:js: node --check grammar_core.js && node --check grammar_data.js && node --check vocab_scheduler.js && node --check vocab_data.js && node --check teacher_vocab_bank.js && node --check teacher_vocab.js && node --check vocab_sense_bank.js && node --check cc_cedict_supplement.js && node --check vocab_pos_inference.js && node --check fallback_dictionary.js && node --check vocab_audio.js && node --check vocab_example_utils.js && node --check vocab_example_seed.js && node --check app.js && node --check firebase-init.js && node --check scripts/build-web.js && node --check scripts/firebase-cli.js && node --check scripts/import-teacher-vocab.js && node --check scripts/enrich-teacher-vocab-pos.js && node --check scripts/import-offline-dictionary.js && node --check scripts/import-oxford-cefr.js && node --check scripts/generate-vocab-examples.js && node --check scripts/review-vocab-example-seed.js && node --check scripts/generate-vocab-meanings.js && node --check scripts/review-vocab-meaning-seed.js && node --check scripts/python-runner.js && npm --prefix functions run lint && node --check functions/seed-students.js
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:run: npm run build:web && npx cap run android --target S2AIOC447307NGJ
